title: Elbaf’s Children Become Targets
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Nami, Unknown person #8, Ripley, Robin, Zoro as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Stop that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know we're not allowed to harm cute humans!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Sorry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They're so Laaaaaame!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And don't call them 'shorties' either!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Are these brats really Elbaf's future warriors?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Watch it! You can't just say words like "Brat" anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is surreal... We weren't even offended by that shorteries comment!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And aren't you guys meant to be wild fighters willing to pillage and burn the seas themselves?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Fighters? Now way! That's dangerous!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huuuuh?! But you bastards are the next generation of Elbaf Warriors, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You can't say 'Bastard' either!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Come on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Words like that are old fashioned...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, that was an adult just now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Old fashioned?! What's that meant to mean?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You should probably move...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're gonna get told off!

dialogue.speaker: Ripley
dialogue.text: you're standing on Miss Ripley...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Woah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Flap

dialogue.speaker: Ripley
dialogue.text: walrus folk school (biology teacher) RIPLEY

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We climbed onto a giant?! Our bad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aha ha! No worries. You're feather-light.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, I bet this is a culture shock for you, but all those legends of Fearsome giant pirates are from 100 years ago, y"know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Foul Mouths? Aggression? Plundering? War?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those are relics of a bygone era now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Welcome to Elbaf, Straw hats.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: I heard about you from Saul.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: There you are, Luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Sorry about our loud mouthed brats.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Didn't you just say words like that were behind the times?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do as I say, not as I do.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yeah, Miss, You're so Naughty!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: *Seek to trade with other nations, not wage war!!*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our beloved late King Harold said those wise words.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He often flashed with all the grayboards of the villages.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: King Harold!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A visionary of a King who wanted to revolutionize our country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was slain by his actual flesh and blood. That crazy prince...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The country still refuses to recognize his claim to the throne. That's why Elbaf doesn't currently have a sovereign.

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
